description: Ideal for Sports sessions and for keeping your essentials handy, this puma Deck backpack is a durable construction packed with storage space. With a zip flap and front organiser space, this puma rucksack has room for all your accessories and stationary. With a large main compartment and adjustable shoulder straps, it's an ideal backpack for school, work, travel and fitness. Length: 32.5 cm Made of 100% nylon for easy cleaning and longer life Has branded zippers for durability Large main compartment with a two-way zipper Two front zip pockets with an organiser Two adjustable, padded shoulder straps for handling ease Branding across the front flap Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
